note: Resolved es1 + es2. es1=B: recruiter-only MVP, client view (g4/f7) -> v1.1. es2=A: TalentOS fairness audit is IN the MVP.

brief_changes.rationale: Accepted challenges. g2 fairness challenge (security) -> new goal g5. c2 timeline challenge (pm+eng+sec) -> ng5 formalizes client view as v1.1 (not a Brief error, a scope decision).

not_rerun.engineer: traces to g2 but the fairness surface is one more TalentOS endpoint the existing adapter already covers — no architectural move. Stays byte-identical.
not_rerun.security: this is security's own recommendation, now adopted; its analysis is unchanged. Stays byte-identical.

consensus_rerun_reason: PM adds a low-cost feature (fairness, already in TalentOS) under an already-narrowed recruiter-only scope; no new conflict with the timeline. Skipped full Consensus per amendment.md step 6; decisions.json updated to record accepted challenges.
